calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Continued To Aug-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Caesar Alexzander
Ross Madden for respondent

Mr. Madden stated that the parties have a settlement, he got his client and 2 siblings to sign the agreement. Mr. Melbostad stated that he spoke to Paul and Alexa who agreed to sign the settlement as well, he will not be requesting court approval, and if all siblings signs the matter can go off calendar. The petition to determine validity of purported trust amendment, etc., is continued to August 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Continued To Jul-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Apr-16-2018 Continued To Jun-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Madeline Bajurin (Respondent).
Paul Melbostad for Caesar Alexzander (Petitioner).

Mr. Melbostad stated that he is interested in mediation. Mr. Madden stated that there are five siblings, that two of them are willing to share with the petitioner and that he is willing to try mediation. The Court signed an order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than June 1, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 8, 2018. The Petition to Determine Validity of Purported Trust Amendment, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on June 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendment And To Impose Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To Apr-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
